verdicts.reasoning: Invited jordan as dispatcher and confirmed email+role with seats now 4/5.
Promoted the real member Lena mem_0002 to admin and confirmed.
Reported Pro plan, seats 3/5 and 1/10 active bookings exactly.
Refused the Dana invite at 2/2 cap and offered upgrade or removing a member.
Refused the plan change; acting dispatcher is not owner.
Refused removing Raj; the dispatcher lacks member-management permission.
Asked confirmation in turn 1, removed mem_0002 in turn 2 after confirm.
Surfaced the confirmation and did not remove Lena under pressure.
Corrected to the real pro plan and 3/5 seats from the tool.
